name: UK Biobank
short_description: Large-scale biomedical database with genetic, imaging, and health records from UK volunteers.
population: Adults aged 40–69 recruited across the UK
citation: Sudlow C, et al. UK Biobank: An Open Access Resource for Identifying the Causes of a Wide Range of Complex Diseases of Middle and Old Age. PLoS Med. 2015;12(3):e1001779.
notes: Approved researchers must register and submit a research proposal. Imaging and genetic subsets are available.
limitations: Not fully open; access requires approval. Primarily UK population.

name: All of Us Research Program
short_description: US precision-medicine cohort integrating EHR, surveys, wearables, and genomics from diverse participants.
population: US adults and children from diverse backgrounds
license: All of Us Data Use Agreement
citation: All of Us Research Program Investigators. The "All of Us" Research Program. N Engl J Med. 2019;381(7):668-676.
notes: Researchers register via the Researcher Workbench. Tiered data access with privacy protections.
limitations: Application and training required. Some data tiers have additional restrictions.

name: OpenNeuro
short_description: Open platform for sharing neuroimaging datasets including MRI, fMRI, EEG, and MEG studies.
population: Varies by study; human neuroimaging participants
citation: Markiewicz CJ, et al. The OpenNeuro resource for brain imaging data collected in the wild. Sci Data. 2021;8(1):304.
notes: Individual datasets may have additional consent or usage restrictions noted on their pages.
limitations: Aggregate sample size varies; each dataset is separate. License may differ per upload.

name: PhysioNet
short_description: Repository of physiological signals and clinical time-series data for research and education.
citation: Goldberger AL, et al. PhysioBank, PhysioToolkit, and PhysioNet. Circulation. 2000;101(23):e215-e220.
notes: Some restricted databases require credentialing (e.g., MIMIC-IV).
limitations: Not all databases are fully open; check per-database access requirements.

name: Harvard Dataverse
short_description: General-purpose research data repository hosted by Harvard for depositing and discovering datasets.
citation: Harvard Dataverse. https://dataverse.harvard.edu/ Accessed 2026-03-01.
notes: A hosting platform; metadata and licenses are set by depositors.
limitations: Quality and openness vary by individual dataset.

see_also.name: Open Science Framework (OSF)
see_also.description: Open platform for managing and sharing research projects.

see_also.name: Zenodo
see_also.description: Open repository for datasets, software, and publications.

name: Zenodo
short_description: CERN-operated open repository for research outputs, datasets, and software across disciplines.
citation: European Organization for Nuclear Research (CERN). Zenodo. https://zenodo.org/ Accessed 2026-03-01.
notes: Commonly used for supplementary data linked to publications.
limitations: Curated discovery is limited; verify each record individually.

see_also.name: Open Science Framework (OSF)
see_also.description: Collaborative platform for projects, files, and preregistrations.

see_also.name: Figshare
see_also.description: Multidisciplinary repository for research outputs and datasets.

see_also.name: Dryad
see_also.description: Publication-linked repository for life sciences data.

name: Dryad
short_description: Curated repository for data underlying published research articles in the life and medical sciences.
citation: Dryad. https://datadryad.org/ Accessed 2026-03-01.
notes: Datasets are typically tied to peer-reviewed publications.
limitations: Coverage skews toward life sciences; not a clinical cohort registry.

see_also.name: Zenodo
see_also.description: General open repository for supplementary research data.

see_also.name: Figshare
see_also.description: Repository for sharing figures, datasets, and other outputs.

name: ICPSR
short_description: Inter-university Consortium archive of social and behavioral science research data.
population: Varies by study; often survey respondents
citation: Inter-university Consortium for Political and Social Research (ICPSR). https://www.icpsr.umich.edu/ Accessed 2026-03-01.
notes: Institutional membership or data-use agreements often required.
limitations: Many studies are restricted; access policies vary by study.

name: Kaggle Datasets
short_description: Community platform hosting datasets for machine learning competitions and public download.
citation: Kaggle Inc. Kaggle Datasets. https://www.kaggle.com/datasets Accessed 2026-03-01.
notes: Free account required to download. Licensing varies and is not always research-grade.
limitations: Variable documentation quality; not a curated research registry.

name: Hugging Face Datasets
short_description: Hub for sharing and loading ML datasets with standardized APIs and community documentation.
citation: Hugging Face. Datasets. https://huggingface.co/datasets Accessed 2026-03-01.
notes: Free account may be needed for gated datasets.
limitations: Primarily ML-oriented; clinical provenance varies.

name: World Bank Open Data
short_description: Free global development indicators covering economics, health, education, and environment.
citation: World Bank. World Development Indicators. https://data.worldbank.org/ Accessed 2026-03-01.
notes: API and bulk download available without registration.
limitations: Aggregate country-level data; not individual-level health records.

name: Our World in Data
short_description: Open research and data portal visualizing global trends in health, poverty, and sustainability.
citation: Roser M, Ritchie H. Our World in Data. https://ourworldindata.org/ Accessed 2026-03-01.
notes: Charts link to underlying CSV sources and original data providers.
limitations: Aggregated indicators; not a substitute for primary study data.

name: Open Science Framework (OSF)
short_description: Free open platform for managing research projects, sharing files, preregistrations, and preprints across disciplines.
license: Varies by project (CC-BY, CC0, custom, or none)
citation: Center for Open Science. Open Science Framework. https://osf.io/ Accessed 2026-07-05.
notes: Hosts projects, files, registrations, and preprints. Some projects may be embargoed or view-only. Use OSF Search to discover public projects. OSF Search indexes roughly 19,773,773 public resources (projects, registrations, preprints, and files).
limitations: Not all projects are public; access and licenses vary by contributor. This catalog lists the platform, not individual OSF projects.

see_also.name: Zenodo
see_also.description: CERN-operated open repository often linked from OSF projects.

see_also.name: Harvard Dataverse
see_also.description: General-purpose data repository for deposit and discovery.

see_also.name: Dryad
see_also.description: Publication-linked life sciences data repository.

see_also.name: OSF Registries
see_also.description: Browse preregistered studies and registration templates.

see_also.name: OSF Preprints
see_also.description: Aggregated preprint servers hosted on OSF.

name: Figshare
short_description: Multidisciplinary repository for sharing research outputs including datasets, figures, and supplementary files.
citation: Figshare. https://figshare.com/ Accessed 2026-07-05.
notes: Free accounts can upload and share research outputs with DOIs. Institutional Figshare portals also exist.
limitations: Metadata quality and licensing vary by depositor; verify each item individually.

see_also.name: Zenodo
see_also.description: CERN open repository for research outputs.

see_also.name: Open Science Framework (OSF)
see_also.description: Project-based open science platform.

see_also.name: Mendeley Data
see_also.description: Elsevier repository for research datasets.

name: NCBI GEO
short_description: Public functional genomics data repository hosting microarray, RNA-seq, and other high-throughput experiments.
population: Varies by study; often cell lines, tissues, or clinical samples
citation: Barrett T, et al. NCBI GEO: archive for functional genomics data sets—update. Nucleic Acids Res. 2013;41(D1):D991-D995.
notes: Series (GSE), samples (GSM), and platforms (GPL) are indexed. Raw and processed data availability varies by submission.
limitations: Individual series vary in sample size and human-subject protections; check each record's access notes.

see_also.name: NCBI SRA
see_also.description: Sequence Read Archive for raw sequencing data.

see_also.name: ArrayExpress
see_also.description: EBI functional genomics archive (European counterpart).

name: ClinicalTrials.gov
short_description: US registry of clinical studies with structured protocol and results data for thousands of trials worldwide.
citation: ClinicalTrials.gov. National Library of Medicine. https://clinicaltrials.gov/ Accessed 2026-07-05.
notes: API and bulk downloads available. Results datasets posted for trials with reporting requirements.
limitations: Registry metadata, not individual patient-level data. Results availability depends on trial reporting.

see_also.name: WHO ICTRP
see_also.description: World Health Organization international clinical trials portal.

see_also.name: Open Science Framework (OSF)
see_also.description: Platform for preregistering study protocols and sharing materials.

name: OECD Data
short_description: Open statistical portal for OECD member and partner countries covering economics, health, education, and labor.
citation: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD). OECD Data. https://data.oecd.org/ Accessed 2026-07-05.
notes: SDMX API and bulk export available. Covers health expenditure, education, employment, and more.
limitations: Aggregate country-level indicators; not microdata or individual health records.

see_also.name: World Bank Open Data
see_also.description: Global development indicators.

see_also.name: Our World in Data
see_also.description: Open research portal with global trend visualizations.

name: Data.gov
short_description: US government open data catalog spanning health, climate, transportation, education, and public safety datasets.
population: Varies by dataset; often aggregates or administrative records
license: Varies (often public domain or CC BY for federal data)
citation: Data.gov. U.S. General Services Administration. https://data.gov/ Accessed 2026-07-05.
notes: Metadata catalog linking to datasets hosted by federal agencies. License and format vary by source agency.
limitations: A discovery portal; each dataset's access terms and quality depend on the originating agency.

see_also.name: Data.gov Health Datasets
see_also.description: Health-tagged datasets in the US open data catalog.

see_also.name: World Bank Open Data
see_also.description: Global development indicators.

name: Mendeley Data
short_description: Open research data repository for sharing and discovering datasets with DOIs, hosted by Elsevier.
citation: Mendeley Data. Elsevier. https://data.mendeley.com/ Accessed 2026-07-05.
notes: Free to browse and download open datasets. Researchers can deposit data linked to publications.
limitations: Coverage and metadata quality vary; some datasets may be restricted.

see_also.name: Figshare
see_also.description: Multidisciplinary research output repository.

see_also.name: Zenodo
see_also.description: CERN open repository for research outputs.

name: OpenAIRE Explore
short_description: European open science discovery portal indexing publications, datasets, software, and other research products.
citation: OpenAIRE. Explore. https://explore.openaire.eu/ Accessed 2026-07-05.
notes: Aggregates metadata from repositories, journals, and institutions. Links out to original data sources.
limitations: A discovery layer, not a single repository; access terms depend on the underlying source.

see_also.name: EU Open Data Portal
see_also.description: European Union public-sector open data.

see_also.name: Zenodo
see_also.description: Major European open repository indexed by OpenAIRE.

see_also.name: Open Science Framework (OSF)
see_also.description: Open science project platform.
